hero.title: Stop deciphering logs.
hero.description: The first AI assistant that translates your Linux server errors into ready-to-use solutions. Built on 20+ years of enterprise systems expertise — the Metodo Sacchi (Safety First).

problem.title: The Problem
problem.intro: It's 1 AM. The server is down. The logs are an incomprehensible wall of text. How much time will you waste before finding the right fix?
problem.pain_1_desc: Searching through outdated threads for a fix that matches your exact error.
problem.pain_2_desc: Every minute your server is down costs money and trust.
problem.pain_3_desc: Copy-pasting commands you don't fully understand can make things worse.

solution.title: The Solution: Metodo Sacchi
solution.intro: This isn't just another AI chatbot. LogWhispererAI is trained on 20+ years of real-world systems administration experience. Every suggestion follows the Safety First protocol: little often, double check.
solution.step_1_desc: From machine jargon to plain English. Understand exactly what went wrong and why — no guessing.
solution.step_2_desc: Receive the precise command to copy and paste. No vague suggestions — actionable solutions only.
solution.step_3_desc: Every recommendation follows the 'little often, double check' protocol. Destructive commands are flagged and explained.
solution.instant_desc: Get notified immediately via Telegram or Slack when your server logs contain actionable errors. No manual log checking. No reactive firefighting.

howitworks.title: How It Works
howitworks.step_1_desc: Paste your log text or upload a log file. We'll automatically detect the format (syslog, kernel, dmesg, etc.)
howitworks.step_2_desc: Our AI identifies the root cause and translates technical jargon into plain English. You'll understand exactly what went wrong.
howitworks.step_3_desc: Receive the exact command to resolve the issue. Every suggestion follows the Safety First protocol.

authority.title: Authority
authority.bio: 20+ years managing mission-critical Unix/Linux infrastructure. Educator for ITS/IFTS programs, bridging academic theory with enterprise-grade operations.
authority.ai_desc: LogWhispererAI is built on the patterns, failures, and solutions encountered across two decades of enterprise systems administration. The AI doesn't guess — it applies proven methodologies.
authority.language_note_desc: During the Beta phase, AI responses are provided in English. Full multilingual support is planned for the final release.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1_question: Is this really free during beta?
faq.q1_answer: Yes. The entire beta period is completely free. No credit card required. No hidden fees. When the beta ends, plans will start at €50/month — but the first 50 beta testers get a Lifetime Founder coupon with 50% off.
faq.q2_question: What languages does the AI support?
faq.q2_answer: During beta, AI responses are in English. Italian and other languages are planned for the final release. You can upload logs in any format.
faq.q3_answer: The AI is trained on 20+ years of real-world system administration patterns. Every recommendation follows the 'Safety First' protocol — destructive commands are flagged before execution.
faq.q4_question: What log formats can I upload?
faq.q4_answer: Any text-based log format: syslog, kernel.log, dmesg, journalctl, Apache, Nginx, Docker, Kubernetes, or custom application logs. Max file size: 1MB.
faq.q5_question: Will this work for production servers?
faq.q5_answer: LogWhispererAI analyzes log files — it doesn't connect to your servers. You can safely upload anonymized logs from any environment including production.
faq.q6_question: How do I get my free log analysis?
faq.q6_answer: Fill out the signup form below and describe or attach the log that's causing you trouble. We'll analyze it and send the solution to your email within 24 hours.

signup.title: Join the Closed Beta
signup.headline: Be among the first to fix logs with AI.
signup.description: Join the closed beta and get free access to LogWhispererAI. Upload a real log that's driving you crazy — we'll send you the solution via email as a beta test.
signup.benefit_1: Free during the entire beta period
signup.benefit_2: Direct feedback channel with the founder
signup.benefit_3: Priority access to the final release
signup.benefit_4: Upload a log, get a free AI analysis
signup.message_placeholder: Describe your log issue or tell us about your setup...
signup.log_prompt: Have a log that is driving you crazy? Describe it or mention it in the form — we will send you a free AI analysis as a beta test.
signup.success_message: Thank you! We'll be in touch soon.
signup.error_message: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us at logwhisperer@thelinuxformula.com
signup.js_required: JavaScript required for form submission. Email us at

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.beta_notice: Currently in Closed Beta. All features are free during the beta period — no charges apply. Join the waitlist to test the service at no cost.
pricing.founder_discount: The first 50 beta testers who help us validate the service will receive a "Lifetime Founder" coupon with 50% off when we go live.

footer.tagline: Architectural-grade insights for enterprise Linux systems.
